scripts.build: npm run -w @specflow/client build && npm run -w @specflow/app build
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n server,client "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.test: npm run -w @specflow/app test && npm run -w @specflow/client test
scripts.ui: npm run build && node packages/app/dist/cli.js ui
